raw.subject: Your Mobile page caught my eye, Da Wash Auto Spa
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about Detail season being here really caught my eye - I love how you're offering a package for every car! It's great to see local businesses like yours supporting the community with their services.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on potential bookings and calls from customers who prefer a more traditional way to find and contact local businesses.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from what I've seen on your Facebook page, featuring a services overview, photo gallery, contact section, and even a map & hours section. You can take a look here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/da-wash-auto-spa-mobile

I'd love to discuss how building a website like this could be a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses - let's chat more about it if you're interested. Please reply or give me a quick call to get started.
